en: But every touch is ooh-la-la-la, it's true-la-la-la
Ooh, I should be runnin', ooh, you keep me comin' for ya
Land in Miami, the air was hot from summer rain
Sweat drippin' off me, before I even knew her name
La-la-la, you felt like ooh-la-la-la, yeah, no
ko: 너는 우 라 라 라 같았어

en: Sapphire moonlight, we danced for hours in the same tequila sunrise
Her body fit right in my hands, la-la-la
ko: 그녀의 몸이 내 손에 딱 맞았어
너는 우 라 라 라 같았어, 응

en: I love it when you call me senorita
ko: 네가 나를 세뇨리타라고 부를 때가 좋아

en: I wish I could pretend I didn't need ya
ko: 네가 필요 없다고 가장할 수 있으면 좋겠어

en: But every touch is ooh-la-la-la, it's true-la-la-la
ko: 하지만 모든 터치가 우 라 라 라야

en: Ooh, I should be runnin', ooh, you know I love it when you call me senorita
